conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to C, as our conversation delved into personal experiences like handling pressure and life decisions, which made it feel authentic and meaningful. I also connected well with B, sharing stories about family trips and our shared love for nature, and with D, through discussions on teamwork and past game turnarounds that built a sense of mutual understanding. In contrast, I felt least connected to A, since our talk stayed mostly on the surface, focusing on general strategies without much personal depth.

I made several agreements during the conversations, such as planning to team up early and share strategies with I and E, and reaching out to potential allies like M with J. Going into the game, I trust C and B the most based on our genuine and open exchanges, but I specifically do not trust anyone who seemed overly cautious or vague, like parts of my chat with A, as they might not follow through.
